headline.purpose: Default page titles and main route headings.

title.purpose: Article titles, resume sections, and list headings.

body-large.purpose: Homepage, now-page, and lead introductory prose.

label.purpose: Links, buttons, dates, and concise metadata.

mono-label.purpose: Camera metadata, generated OG tooling, and terminal-like readouts.

shadows.name: photo-rest
shadows.purpose: The resting image tile shadow in the moments masonry grid.

shadows.name: photo-hover
shadows.purpose: The hover elevation for photography tiles.

shadows.name: lightbox-image
shadows.purpose: The immersive photo viewer image shadow.

motion.name: state-quick
motion.purpose: Default links, buttons, chips, and inline-note opacity.

motion.name: photo-overlay
motion.purpose: Photography overlay and lightbox fade timing.

motion.name: photo-scale
motion.purpose: Subtle image zoom on moments tiles.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact black control for the resume PDF and utility surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #000; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: White bordered control for lower-emphasis resume actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #374151; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f9fafb; border-color: #9ca3af; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #f3f4f6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Inline Link
components.css: .ds-inline-link { color: var(--color-text-link, #000); font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-weight: 500; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-inline-link:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); } .ds-inline-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Quiet metadata chip for blog tags.
components.css: .ds-tag-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #f9fafb; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #6b6b6b); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-tag-chip:hover { background: #f3f4f6; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); } .ds-tag-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Article List Item
components.description: Flat article preview separated by a single bottom rule.
components.html:
Building Kira, an AI-native second brain

June 12, 20265 min read

Technical notes with enough context to decide whether to keep reading.
components.css: .ds-article-item { padding-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); } .ds-article-item h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: var(--font-serif, Georgia, serif); font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.25; color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); } .ds-article-item a { color: var(--color-text-link, #000); font-weight: 500; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; } .ds-article-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #6b6b6b); } .ds-article-item p { margin: 16px 0 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65; color: #4b5563; }

components.name: Timeline Item
components.description: Resume entry with a calm serif title and compact metadata.
components.html:
2026

Agent runtime architect

DreamNum|Now

Building spreadsheet editing capabilities for agents.
components.css: .ds-timeline-item { position: relative; padding-left: 24px; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); } .ds-timeline-year { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-timeline-item h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); font-family: var(--font-serif, Georgia, serif); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-timeline-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #6b6b6b); } .ds-timeline-meta strong { color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); font-weight: 500; } .ds-timeline-item p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Inline Note Tooltip
components.description: Small annotation tooltip for inline notes.
components.html: runtime boundaryA short contextual note.
components.css: .ds-note-trigger { border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--color-text-tertiary, #6b6b6b); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); cursor: help; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-note-trigger:hover { border-color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); } .ds-note-tooltip { display: inline-block; max-width: min(320px, calc(100vw - 32px)); margin-left: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e5e5e5); background: var(--color-background, #fff); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4a4a); padding: 4px 8px; font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Moments Photo Tile
components.description: Image-led tile with slow zoom and metadata overlay.
components.css: .ds-photo-tile { position: relative; overflow: hidden; margin: 0; background: #f3f4f6; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: zoom-in; transition: box-shadow 500ms ease; } .ds-photo-tile:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10); } .ds-photo-tile img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; transition: transform 700ms ease-out; } .ds-photo-tile:hover img { transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-photo-tile::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.60), transparent 60%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 500ms ease; } .ds-photo-tile:hover::after { opacity: 1; } .ds-photo-tile figcaption { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 1; padding: 24px; color: #fff; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); transition: opacity 500ms ease, transform 500ms ease; } .ds-photo-tile:hover figcaption { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } .ds-photo-tile strong { display: block; font-family: var(--font-serif, Georgia, serif); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-photo-tile span { display: block; margin-top: 4px; color: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.80); font-family: var(--font-mono, monospace); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Footer Signature
components.description: Quiet sign-off and back-navigation area at the end of pages.
components.css: .ds-footer-signature { margin-top: 96px; padding-top: 32px; color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-footer-signature nav { margin-top: 8px; } .ds-footer-signature a { color: var(--color-text-link, #000); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-footer-signature a:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary, #1a1a1a); }

narrative.overview:
The visual system should feel like a carefully written technical letter: quiet enough for long reading, exact enough for credibility, and personal enough that the author remains visible. The default page is a narrow column, not a marketing shell. Typography and spacing do most of the work; links, dates, rules, and tags provide orientation without creating chrome.

The site is intentionally monochrome and restrained, but the restraint must not become unfinished. Hierarchy comes from serif headings, measured spacing, clear text contrast, and real artifacts: posts, current status, resume entries, projects, and photography. The `moments` surface is the main exception: photography may use deeper backgrounds, overlays, shadows, and slower motion because the image is the artifact.

The system rejects SaaS landing-page cliches, repeated feature-card grids, gradient text, all-purpose AI/productivity aesthetics, conversion-heavy calls to action, maximalist portfolio effects, decorative glassmorphism, generic editorial affectation, and template-generated section grammar.
keyCharacteristics: Narrow reading column with generous vertical rhythm.
Serif headings paired with sans body text and sparse mono metadata.
Black and neutral gray palette with no decorative accent color.
Flat content surfaces; borders and rules carry structure.
Photography is allowed a distinct, immersive treatment.

rules.name: The True White Rule
rules.body: The body background stays white. Do not tint it into cream, sand, ivory, or warm paper to manufacture personality.

rules.name: The No Accent Rule
rules.body: Do not add a brand accent color casually. If a future section needs color, it must be tied to a real artifact such as photography, code output, or a specific project object.

rules.name: The Letter First Rule
rules.body: Serif headings are calm and direct. Do not use italic display flourishes, drop caps, or magazine-like theatrics unless the content is explicitly a designed editorial piece.

rules.name: The Mono Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Monospace is for code, camera metadata, PDF tooling, and terminal-like interfaces. Never use mono as a generic shortcut for "technical."

rules.name: The Flat Manuscript Rule
rules.body: Content pages do not use decorative cards or ambient shadows. If a surface is not an image, preview, tooltip, or modal-like object, it should be flat.

dos: Do keep the page column narrow (`max-w-2xl`) for writing and resume surfaces.
Do use serif headings and sans body text to preserve the letter-like rhythm.
Do use real artifacts: posts, projects, resume entries, current work, and moments.
Do use one-pixel rules and generous spacing for structure.
Do preserve strong contrast for primary, secondary, and tertiary text.
Do let photography use shadows, overlays, and slower motion when the image is the focus.
donts: Don't turn the site into a SaaS landing page with hero metrics, repeated feature-card grids, gradient text, all-purpose AI/productivity aesthetics, or conversion-heavy calls to action.
Don't make it a maximalist portfolio that competes with the writing.
Don't use generic editorial affectation for its own sake: italic display drama, drop caps, repeated tiny uppercase section labels, or broadsheet grid gestures.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders or `border-left` greater than 1px as a new callout pattern.
Don't create template-generated card grids when spacing, headings, and rules can carry the structure.
